MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Joshua Cozine And Request For Monetary Sannctions
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Plaintiff AL LEE (Tel: 415-203-2390) in pro per;
Defendant JOSHUA COZINE (Tel: 310-924-57921) in pro per;

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AL LEE's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Joshua Cozine And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

No opposition filed; motion granted. The Court notes that the objections to the deposition were untimely. The deposition shall occur by November 18. The deposition need not start before 10:30 a.m. on the date of the deposition. Sanctions denied.

Court to sign the proposed order submitted by the prevailing party but reflecting the modification.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION /Notice Of Motion & Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Directed At Defendants Joshua Cozine And Amorphous Ink Comics As Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Al Lee (415.203.2390; AL161237@aol.com) Plaintiff in propria persona (audio only).
Joshua Cozine (310.924.5791; joshuacozine@gmail.com) Defendant in propria persona.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. Defendant stated he USPS mailed verified responses and will send them in pdf via email to the court and plaintiff for review. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AL LEE's Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Directed At Defendants Joshua Cozine And Amorphous Ink Comics As Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions: is Taken Under Submission.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
